name: PersonScopeStructuralSubjects has no empty state
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-02] successful fetch with zero subjects renders only a heading + empty View. Fix: add EmptyStateCard when subjects empty.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: PersonScopeStructuralSubjects maps query.data?.subjects ?? [] with no zero-length branch, so a successful empty result renders only the heading and structural-only text. Variant: single variant, successful query with subjects: [] after loading completes. Regression test: add focused coverage for apps/mobile/src/components/support/PersonScopeStructuralSubjects.tsx (or the existing subjects screen harness) that fails without the fix and passes when an empty-state card/message is rendered instead of a blank list.
